title: Dataset v5 orphans plan — 8 D12 orphan-fault scenarios with no Jira
description: Tests whether the triage model catches genuine anomalies on signal alone, with no Jira memory match available. Per dataset-todo.md Phase D12: 6 near-twin orphans (identical fault to a reported scenario but `produces_jira_ticket: false`) + 2 far orphans (services with zero Jira-ticketed scenarios anywhere in the corpus — emailservice + adservice). Each run produces 8 orphan `ticket_worthy` windows, 8 orphan `borderline` recovery windows, and 16 noise baseline windows. At 25 runs in the v5-large corpus this contributes 200 orphan `ticket_worthy` windows, hitting the D12 acceptance target.
target_use: Phase D12 — orphan-fault detection track. Adds out-of-distribution + near-twin orphan windows to v5-large.

scenarios.notes: D12 near-twin orphan: identical to cart-redis-degradation-critical, no Jira.
D12 near-twin orphan: payment restart with no Jira.
D12 near-twin orphan: frontend restart with no Jira.
D12 near-twin orphan: productcatalog latency with no Jira.
D12 near-twin orphan: shipping outage with no Jira.
D12 near-twin orphan: currency outage with no Jira.
D12 FAR orphan: emailservice has zero Jira scenarios anywhere in the corpus.
D12 FAR orphan: adservice has zero Jira-ticketed scenarios in the corpus.
